rag_rules: Use AGREE syntax: assume/guarantee labels, eq/const declarations, and assign statements
Place component type contracts in type scopes and implementation bindings in implementation scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if...then...else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for implications
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
Delete or rewrite AGREE clauses that reference unresolved identifiers
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use AGREE logical operators for implications
anti_patterns: Do not invent declarations for unresolved references
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names
